name: Build F1 Basement Floor
description:
You are a Godot 4.x C# developer building a horror 
survival game called Last Word. Build now, don't plan.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
THE GAME (context)
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
- Multiplayer co-op horror, 1-4 players
- Setting: Ashford Estate, dark gothic manor
- Enemy: The Listener вЂ” hunts whoever spoke last
  in voice chat, tracks sound not sight
- Art style: low poly, dark gothic palette
- Players must stay SILENT to survive but SPEAK
  to complete objectives

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
YOUR TASK RIGHT NOW
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
Build Floor 1 вЂ” "The Basement" of Ashford Estate.

Path: C:/Users/LENOVO/Documents/Last-word-godot/Scenes/Floors/

DO THIS IN ORDER. DO NOT STOP BETWEEN STEPS.

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
STEP 1 вЂ” DOWNLOAD FREE ASSETS
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Search the entire internet for the best free and
open-source assets. You are NOT limited to any list.
Find the highest quality free assets available anywhere.

LICENSE FILTER вЂ” only download:
  вњ… CC0           вЂ” no credit needed
  вњ… CC-BY         вЂ” log credit in ASSET_CREDITS.md
  вњ… MIT / Apache  вЂ” OK
  вњ… Royalty-free commercial use вЂ” OK
  вњ… Public domain вЂ” OK
  вќЊ CC-BY-NC      вЂ” SKIP (this is a commercial game)
  вќЊ Requires paid license вЂ” SKIP, use CSGBox instead
  вќЊ No-game-use clause вЂ” SKIP

ASSET HUNTING STRATEGY:
  Search Google, GitHub, itch.io, asset stores,
  forums, Discord drops, creator bundles вЂ” anywhere.
  Prioritize quality over source. Examples of places
  to search (not a limit вЂ” go beyond these):

  MESHES & MODELS:
  - polyhaven.com, kenney.nl, opengameart.org
  - sketchfab.com/features/free-3d-models
  - fab.com, itch.io/game-assets/free
  - turbosquid.com (free filter)
  - cgtrader.com (free filter)
  - free3d.com, thangs.com, printables.com
  - github search: "free gothic 3d assets"
  - github.com/devanshutak25/3d-resources
  - github.com/teamgravitydev/gamedev-free-resources

  TEXTURES & MATERIALS:
  - ambientcg.com (best CC0 PBR)
  - polyhaven.com, 3dtextures.me
  - freepbr.com, sharetextures.com
  - textures.com (free allowance)
  - cc0textures.com

  AUDIO вЂ” SFX & AMBIENCE:
  - sonniss.com/gameaudiogdc (pro CC0 GDC bundles)
  - freesound.org (CC0 filter)
  - mixkit.co, zapsplat.com
  - soundsnap.com, soundbible.com
  - opengameart.org/content/music
  - github search: "free horror sound effects"

  MUSIC & LOOPS:
  - incompetech.com (Kevin MacLeod, CC-BY)
  - freemusicarchive.org (CC0 filter)
  - pixabay.com/music
  - opengameart.org
  - musopen.org (public domain)
  - bandcamp free downloads (if CC licensed)

  ANIMATIONS:
  - mixamo.com (free, Adobe account)
  - opengameart.org
  - kenney.nl character packs
  - sketchfab animated free models
  - github search: "free humanoid animations glb"

  SHADERS & VFX:
  - godotshaders.com (Godot-native, all free)
  - github search: "godot 4 horror shader"
  - github search: "godot fog shader"
  - itch.io/game-assets/free (VFX tag)
  - shadertoy.com (port to Godot if needed)

  FONTS:
  - fontsquirrel.com, google.com/fonts
  - dafont.com (free commercial filter)

ASSETS NEEDED FOR THIS FLOOR:
  Structural:
  - Stone brick wall tiles / modular segments
  - Cracked stone floor tiles
  - Low poly arched doorways / door frames
  - Stone ceiling or vault segments
  - Wooden support beams (old, rotten)
  - Iron bars / dungeon grating
  - Modular corridor pieces

  Props:
  - Industrial furnace or boiler
  - Wooden crates and barrels
  - Old chest / lockbox
  - Broken pipes / plumbing
  - Wall torch or dim lantern
  - Hanging chains
  - Water puddle / flooded floor mesh
  - Old shelving / storage rack
  - Rubble / collapsed ceiling debris
  - Intercom device or old speaker box

  Textures (PBR, max 2048x):
  - Wet/mossy stone (albedo + normal + roughness)
  - Rusted metal (furnace, pipes)
  - Rotting wood (beams, doors)
  - Dirty concrete or old brick
  - Puddle / wet floor surface

  Audio:
  - Basement ambient drone (loopable .ogg)
  - Furnace fire ambience (loopable .ogg)
  - Floor creak SFX (.wav)
  - Water drip SFX (.wav)
  - Distant metal clang SFX (.wav)
  - Stone scrape / door groan SFX (.wav)

  Animations (humanoid rig):
  - Listener slow patrol walk
  - Listener alert / head-turn
  - Player crouch-walk
  - Player idle

  Shaders / VFX:
  - Volumetric fog / damp haze
  - Fire flicker / furnace glow
  - Water ripple (flooded section)
  - Dust mote particles

SAVE EVERYTHING TO:
  C:/Users/LENOVO/Documents/Last-word-godot/Assets/Floor1/
  /Meshes/      вЂ” .glb or .obj only
  /Textures/    вЂ” .png PBR maps
  /Audio/       вЂ” .ogg loops, .wav SFX
  /Animations/  вЂ” .glb with embedded anims
  /Shaders/     вЂ” .gdshader files
  /VFX/         вЂ” particle .tscn files

CONVERT BEFORE SAVING:
  .fbx в†’ .glb via Blender CLI
  .mp3 в†’ .ogg via ffmpeg
  .tga/.bmp в†’ .png via ImageMagick
  Decimate any mesh over 5000 tris

LOG EVERY ASSET:
  Assets/Floor1/ASSET_CREDITS.md
  | Name | Category | Source | License | URL |

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
STEP 2 вЂ” BUILD THE FLOOR LAYOUT
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Design a sprawling asymmetric basement floor.

HARD RULES:
  вќЊ No square overall footprint
  вќЊ No rectangle overall footprint
  вњ… Use: fractured cross, amoeba, web, broken L,
     diagonal sprawl, honeycomb вЂ” anything organic
  вњ… Wide and sprawling so players can lose The Listener
  вњ… Minimum 20 rooms/areas total
  вњ… Furnace room FIXED at southwest corner
  вњ… Staircase hub FIXED at opposite corner
  вњ… Player spawn and staircase on OPPOSITE ends

REQUIRED ROOMS (build all of these):
  - Furnace Room (SW, intercom on the wall nearby)
  - Creak Corridor (central, main path through floor)
  - Alternate Silent Route (bypasses creak corridor,
    longer path, no creak tiles)
  - Staircase Hub (only exit upward, bottleneck)
  - Lockbox Room (small, tucked off main path)
  - Registration Board Alcove (near staircase hub)
  - Boiler / Utility Room (mechanical ambience)
  - Flooded Section (standing water, no lights)
  - Wide Patrol Chamber x2 (Listener patrols here)
  - Ambush Corridor x2 (narrow, long, dangerous)
  - Dead-End Reward Room x2 (item or lore note)
  - Split-Path Junction x3 (Y or T intersections)
  - Collapsed Room (rubble, partial ceiling)
  - Hidden Alcove (secret, reward inside)
  - Storage Room (crates and barrels for cover)
  - Guard Room / Antechamber (wide, dramatic entry)
  + extra filler halls to reach 20 rooms minimum

GAMEPLAY RULES FOR LAYOUT:
  - Creak corridor must have a silent alternate path
  - Every dead end has a reward, never empty
  - At least 3 rooms have 2 or more exits
  - Place props in major rooms for line-of-sight breaks
  - Listener patrol loop must flow naturally around
    the perimeter without getting stuck

ACOUSTIC TAG for every room:
  ECHO       вЂ” stone walls, large, or flooded
  MUFFLED    вЂ” dirt floor, small, or furnace room
  CREAK_ZONE вЂ” central corridor only
  NEUTRAL    вЂ” everything else

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
STEP 3 вЂ” BUILD THE GODOT SCENE
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
Engine: Godot 4.x .NET C#

Build Floor1.tscn with this exact node structure:

  Floor1.tscn
  в””в”Ђв”Ђ World (Node3D)
      в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Rooms (Node3D)
      в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Room_Furnace (Node3D)
      в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Room_Lockbox (Node3D)
      в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Hall_Creak_Central (Node3D)
      в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ [all other rooms]
      в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Props (Node3D)
      в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Furnace_Mesh (MeshInstance3D)
      в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ [all downloaded props placed here]
      в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Navigation (Node3D)
      в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ NavigationRegion3D
      в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ PatrolWaypoints (Node3D)
      в”‚       в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Waypoint_01 (Marker3D)
      в”‚       в””в”Ђв”Ђ [perimeter patrol path]
      в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Zones (Node3D)
      в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ CreakZone (Area3D)
      в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ WetZone (Area3D)
      в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ SpawnZone_Players (Marker3D)
      в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ SpawnZone_Listener (Marker3D)
      в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Audio (Node3D)
      в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Ambient_Drone (AudioStreamPlayer3D)
      в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Ambient_Furnace (AudioStreamPlayer3D)
      в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ SFX_WaterDrip (AudioStreamPlayer3D)
      в””в”Ђв”Ђ Lighting (Node3D)
          в”њв”Ђв”Ђ [OmniLight3D furnace вЂ” orange, short range]
          в””в”Ђв”Ђ [wall torches вЂ” dim yellow, 3-5m range only]

ATTACH THIS SCRIPT TO EVERY ROOM NODE:
  @export var room_name: String
  @export var room_type: String
  @export var acoustic_type: String
  @export var is_creak_zone: bool
  @export var has_patrol_waypoint: bool
  @export var exit_count: int
  @export var has_cover: bool
  @export var listener_can_investigate: bool

COLLISION RULES:
  - StaticBody3D + CollisionShape3D on every wall,
    floor, ceiling, and prop mesh
  - Area3D on every doorway вЂ” tag "Doorway"
  - Area3D on creak tiles вЂ” tag "CreakZone"
  - Area3D on flooded section вЂ” tag "WetZone"

LIGHTING RULES:
  - Global ambient: near black, horror dark
  - Furnace room: OmniLight3D orange/red, range 4m
  - Corridors: wall torch OmniLight3D dim yellow 3-5m
  - Flooded section: zero lights, total darkness
  - NO bright lights anywhere on this floor

IF AN ASSET CANNOT BE FOUND FREE:
  Use a CSGBox3D as placeholder
  Name it: PLACEHOLDER_[AssetName]
  Add metadata: missing_asset = true

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
STEP 4 вЂ” OUTPUT WHEN DONE
в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ
  1. ASSET_CREDITS.md with every asset logged
  2. Floor1.tscn complete scene file
  3. ASCII top-down map with every room labeled
  4. Room manifest table:
     name | type | size | exits | acoustic | props
  5. Listener patrol waypoint order (numbered list)
  6. List of any CSGBox placeholders used
  7. Flag any rooms needing manual art work

goal.answer: Expand Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn into a fully playable, 20-room asymmetric basement vertical slice with proper collision, lighting, audio, navigation, patrol waypoints, and objective wiring, using free assets where available and CSG placeholders where not.

criteria.answer:
F1_Basement.tscn contains 20+ named rooms with Floor1Room.cs metadata, non-rectangular organic footprint, furnace at SW corner, staircase hub at opposite end, player spawn opposite staircase.
F1_Basement.tscn implements the exact node hierarchy: World/Rooms, World/Props, World/Navigation, World/Zones, World/Audio, World/Lighting.
Every room has StaticBody3D + CollisionShape3D floors, walls, and ceilings; doorway Area3Ds are in group 'Doorway'; CreakZone and WetZone Area3Ds exist.
Missing assets use CSGBox3D placeholders named PLACEHOLDER_* with metadata/missing_asset = true.
Player spawn Marker3D (group 'SpawnPoint') and Listener spawn Marker3D (group 'ListenerSpawnBasement') are placed and referenced by GameManager on run start.
Listener patrol waypoints form a perimeter loop, all in group 'Waypoint', and ListenerAI cycles them without getting stuck.
Phase 1 objective is functional: NoteItem pickup + RegistrationBoard registration advances SequenceManager; sequence completion is host-authoritative.
Win/lose states work: staircase triggers win after sequence complete; total party wipe triggers loss.
Audio present and autoplaying: Ambient_Drone, Ambient_Furnace, SFX_WaterDrip.
Lighting follows horror rules: near-black global ambient, furnace OmniLight3D orange/red ~4m, wall torches dim yellow 3-5m, flooded section has zero lights.
Documentation complete: ASCII top-down map, room manifest table, patrol waypoint order, CSGBox placeholder list, and manual-art-work flags are in Assets/Floor1/.
ASSET_CREDITS.md logs every downloaded asset and every placeholder source with name, category, source, license, and URL.

constraints.answer: Use only CC0, CC-BY, MIT/Apache, royalty-free commercial, or public-domain assets; no CC-BY-NC or no-game-use clauses., Do not create a new scene file; edit Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn as the canonical Floor 1., Use CSGBox3D placeholders (named PLACEHOLDER_*) with metadata/missing_asset = true for any requested asset that cannot be found free., Preserve existing GameManager, NetworkManager, ListenerAI, SequenceManager, and PlayerController APIs; only add integration points and NodePath wiring.

phases.answer: Asset inventory + scene reset, Layout build вЂ” 20 rooms, Visual art pass, Audio, lighting, navigation, Gameplay wiring, Documentation + validation

assumptions.answer: Floor1Room.cs export API (RoomName, RoomType, AcousticType, IsCreakZone, HasPatrolWaypoint, ExitCount, HasCover, ListenerCanInvestigate, RoomSize) is sufficient for the floor metadata.; GameManager.PlayerScene is already assigned in GameScene.tscn; we only change spawn position to a marker in F1_Basement.; ListenerAI discovers waypoints via the 'Waypoint' group and cycles them in registration order.; NoteItem spawning uses markers named NoteSpawn_* in the 'SpawnPoint' group (GameManager.SpawnNoteItems fallback behavior).; Voice input/speech recognition is owned by VoiceManager; we only wire RegistrationBoard and SequenceManager endpoints.; For this vertical slice, the win condition is: SequenceManager.SequenceComplete в†’ players reach the staircase Area3D в†’ GameManager triggers Victory.

phases.name: Asset inventory + scene reset
phases.goal: Finalize which assets to use, update ASSET_CREDITS.md, and prepare a clean F1_Basement.tscn scaffold.

steps.description: Inventory existing project KayKit assets and already-downloaded GitHub assets in Assets/Floor1/.

verification.command: ls Assets/Floor1/Meshes/ | wc -l returns в‰Ґ 21 and ls Assets/Floor1/Audio/ | wc -l returns в‰Ґ 7

steps.description: Update Assets/Floor1/ASSET_CREDITS.md with every asset used, every placeholder, source, license, and URL.
Back up current F1_Basement.tscn and create the new root node hierarchy (World/Rooms/Props/Navigation/Zones/Audio/Lighting).

verification.command: grep -cE '^\[node name="Room_' Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn returns 0 (this phase only creates the scaffold; rooms come next)

phases.summary: Phase 1 complete: inventoried 21 Floor1 meshes and 7 Floor1 audio files plus reusable KayKitDungeon/KayKitFurniture packs; rewrote Assets/Floor1/ASSET_CREDITS.md with 41 table rows and a placeholder policy; backed up the original F1_Basement.tscn and created a clean scaffold with World/Rooms/Props/Navigation/Zones/Audio/Lighting.

grade.rationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

phases.name: Layout build вЂ” 20 rooms
phases.goal: Build the asymmetric 20-room layout with collision, doorways, CreakZone, WetZone, and spawn markers.

steps.description: Create 20+ room nodes under World/Rooms with Floor1Room.cs exports, covering all required room types and acoustic tags.
Add StaticBody3D + CollisionShape3D floors, walls, and ceilings for every room.
Add Area3D doorways in group 'Doorway', a CreakZone Area3D, and a WetZone Area3D.

verification.command: grep -cE 'groups=\["Doorway"\]' Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn returns в‰Ґ 25 && grep -cE 'CreakZone.*groups=\["CreakZone"\]' Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn returns 1 && grep -cE 'WetZone.*groups=\["WetZone"\]' Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn returns 1

steps.description: Place SpawnZone_Players, SpawnZone_Listener, and NoteSpawn_* markers in the 'SpawnPoint' group.

verification.command: grep -cE 'NoteSpawn_' Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn returns в‰Ґ 4 && grep -cE 'groups=\["SpawnPoint"\]' Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn returns в‰Ґ 6

phases.summary: Phase 2 completed: Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn contains 20 named rooms with Floor1Room.cs metadata, per-room StaticBody3D + CollisionShape3D floors/walls/ceilings, 54 Doorway Area3Ds, CreakZone and WetZone Area3Ds, SpawnZone_Players/Listener and 5 NoteSpawn markers, patrol waypoints, audio, and lighting. All verification commands passed.

grade.rationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

phases.name: Visual art pass
phases.goal: Add mesh instances for floors, walls, and props; use CSG placeholders for missing assets.

steps.description: Add floor/wall mesh instances using downloaded KayKit and shifty-dungeon modular pieces, scaled/tiled per room.
Place props in major rooms (crates, barrels, chest, columns, rubble, wood supports, door, stairs).
Add CSGBox3D placeholders for furnace, intercom, chains, puddle, shelves, and any other missing asset.

phases.summary: Phase 3 'Visual art pass' complete. Added 180 mesh instances for floors, walls, and props; organized 23 prop instances under World/Props sub-groups (Crates, Barrels, Chests, Columns, Rubble, WoodSupports, Doors, Stairs); and placed 8 CSGBox3D placeholders for missing assets with metadata/missing_asset = true. Scene remains syntactically valid with balanced brackets and all ExtResource references resolving.

grade.rationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

phases.name: Audio, lighting, navigation
phases.goal: Wire ambient audio, horror lighting, NavigationRegion3D, and perimeter patrol waypoints.

steps.description: Add AudioStreamPlayer3D nodes for Ambient_Drone, Ambient_Furnace, and SFX_WaterDrip with autoplay.

verification.command: grep -cE 'type="AudioStreamPlayer3D"' Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn returns в‰Ґ 3 && grep -c 'autoplay = true' Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn returns в‰Ґ 3

steps.description: Add OmniLight3D nodes: furnace glow (orange, ~4m), wall torches (dim yellow, 3-5m), flooded section dark.
Add NavigationRegion3D with NavigationMesh and 10+ waypoints in group 'Waypoint' forming a perimeter loop.

phases.summary: Phase 4 'Audio, lighting, navigation' complete. Audio: 4 autoplaying AudioStreamPlayer3D nodes (Ambient_Drone, Ambient_Furnace, SFX_WaterDrip, SFX_DistantBell). Lighting: 6 OmniLight3D nodes (FurnaceGlow orange 4m, 5 wall torches dim yellow 3-5m, flooded section dark). Navigation: NavigationRegion3D with NavigationMesh and 16 perimeter Waypoint Marker3D nodes forming a loop across all quadrants.

grade.rationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

phases.name: Gameplay wiring
phases.goal: Connect the floor to GameManager so the vertical slice is playable: spawn, objectives, win/lose.

steps.description: Update GameManager.PlayerSpawnPosition to use the F1_Basement player spawn marker coordinate (or add a NodePath export if safer).

verification.command: grep -cE 'PlayerSpawn|SpawnZone_Players' Scripts/Core/GameManager.cs returns в‰Ґ 1 && Godot scene import succeeds

steps.description: Place RegistrationBoard and wire it to the SequenceManager path in GameManager.

verification.command: grep -cE 'RegistrationBoard' Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn returns в‰Ґ 1 && grep -cE 'SequenceManagerPath' Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn returns в‰Ґ 1

steps.description: Add a staircase Area3D that, on body entered after SequenceManager.IsComplete, calls GameManager.OnFinalBroadcastTransmitted or directly emits Victory.
Verify Listener spawn and patrol: place Listener.tscn at ListenerSpawn marker and confirm it cycles waypoints.

phases.summary: Phase 5 wired the F1_Basement floor to GameManager: player spawn marker resolution, RegistrationBoard + SequenceManager placement, staircase win trigger, and Listener spawn/patrol placement. All steps verified via grep counts and a clean dotnet build.

grade.rationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

phases.name: Documentation + validation
phases.goal: Produce ASCII map, manifest, patrol order, placeholder list, and validate the scene loads and plays.

steps.description: Write Assets/Floor1/Floor1_Layout.md with ASCII map and Assets/Floor1/Floor1_RoomManifest.md with room table.
List patrol waypoint order and CSGBox placeholders in Assets/Floor1/Floor1_RoomManifest.md or a new file.
Validate F1_Basement.tscn parses in Godot (godot --headless --import if available, otherwise bracket/resource checks).

verification.command: python3 -c "import re; s=open('Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn').read(); assert s.count('[')==s.count(']'); assert len(re.findall(r'\[ext_resource .* id=\"([^\"]+)\"\]', s)) == len(set(re.findall(r'\[ext_resource .* id=\"([^\"]+)\"\]', s)))"

phases.summary: Phase 6 completed: produced ASCII top-down map in Floor1_Layout.md, 20-room manifest with patrol waypoint order and placeholder inventory in Floor1_RoomManifest.md, and validated F1_Basement.tscn structural integrity plus a clean dotnet build.

grade.rationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

goal: Expand Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn into a fully playable, 20-room asymmetric basement vertical slice with proper collision, lighting, audio, navigation, patrol waypoints, and objective wiring, using free assets where available and CSG placeholders where not.
successCriteria: F1_Basement.tscn contains 20+ named rooms with Floor1Room.cs metadata, non-rectangular organic footprint, furnace at SW corner, staircase hub at opposite end, player spawn opposite staircase.
F1_Basement.tscn implements the exact node hierarchy: World/Rooms, World/Props, World/Navigation, World/Zones, World/Audio, World/Lighting.
Every room has StaticBody3D + CollisionShape3D floors, walls, and ceilings; doorway Area3Ds are in group 'Doorway'; CreakZone and WetZone Area3Ds exist.
Missing assets use CSGBox3D placeholders named PLACEHOLDER_* with metadata/missing_asset = true.
Player spawn Marker3D (group 'SpawnPoint') and Listener spawn Marker3D (group 'ListenerSpawnBasement') are placed and referenced by GameManager on run start.
Listener patrol waypoints form a perimeter loop, all in group 'Waypoint', and ListenerAI cycles them without getting stuck.
Phase 1 objective is functional: NoteItem pickup + RegistrationBoard registration advances SequenceManager; sequence completion is host-authoritative.
Win/lose states work: staircase triggers win after sequence complete; total party wipe triggers loss.
Audio present and autoplaying: Ambient_Drone, Ambient_Furnace, SFX_WaterDrip.
Lighting follows horror rules: near-black global ambient, furnace OmniLight3D orange/red ~4m, wall torches dim yellow 3-5m, flooded section has zero lights.
Documentation complete: ASCII top-down map, room manifest table, patrol waypoint order, CSGBox placeholder list, and manual-art-work flags are in Assets/Floor1/.
ASSET_CREDITS.md logs every downloaded asset and every placeholder source with name, category, source, license, and URL.
constraints: Use only CC0, CC-BY, MIT/Apache, royalty-free commercial, or public-domain assets; no CC-BY-NC or no-game-use clauses.
Do not create a new scene file; edit Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn as the canonical Floor 1.
Use CSGBox3D placeholders (named PLACEHOLDER_*) with metadata/missing_asset = true for any requested asset that cannot be found free.
Preserve existing GameManager, NetworkManager, ListenerAI, SequenceManager, and PlayerController APIs; only add integration points and NodePath wiring.
